blocks.title: Plan & Prime
blocks.desc: Set the day's 3 targets. Quick inbox scan only — no replying.

blocks.title: 🔒 Deep Work 1 — Long-form
blocks.desc: Peak hours. Scripting, story design, editing. Phone away, no Slack.

blocks.title: 📌 Daily Post
blocks.desc: Post the day's content (same time every day). PLACEHOLDER 12:00pm — change if needed.

blocks.title: Editor Team & Handoffs
blocks.desc: Review editor cuts, give feedback, prep batches.

blocks.title: Comms Batch
blocks.desc: Email, Sai messages, scheduling — all at once.

blocks.title: Shutdown
blocks.desc: Close loops, set up tomorrow. Clean stop.

blocks.title: 🔒 Deep Work — Flexible (TBD)
blocks.desc: Night deep-work block. Rename when you know what it is — move/resize freely.
